headline: CommonSpirit, Humana reach new nationwide Medicare Advantage contract
summary: The new agreement will give Humana’s MA members access to CommonSpirit’s doctors and facilities for the next three years, and returns CommonSpirit to Humana’s networks in Colorado and Texas.
